author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Fixed all 24 CRITICAL+HIGH+MEDIUM issues across 8 files. Stride views: data() rejects non-contiguous, view_reshape/view_operation auto-contiguify, is_contiguous handles size-1 dims, contiguous_t preserves device, to(Cuda) contiguifies first, display uses data_vec. SIMD math: NaN/inf guards on exp/log, tanh clamped, log(-x) returns NaN, 10 new edge case tests. AdamW: partial failure rollback, load_state_dict warns on variant mismatch. Grad accum: data_mut UB replaced with allocate-new, shape+length validation added. GPU vec4: _into buffer length validation. All 752 tests pass.
